seoTitle: Fern Bay vs Fernances — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Fern Bay and Fernances. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Fern Bay vs Fernances: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Fern Bay and Fernances.
heading: Fern Bay vs Fernances — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Fern Bay, New South Wales and Fernances, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Fern Bay has a lower overall climate risk score (40/100) compared to Fernances (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Fern Bay or Fernances safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Fern Bay has a flood risk score of 26/100, while Fernances scores 50/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Fern Bay scores 54/100 for bushfire risk. Fernances scores 52/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Fern Bay or Fernances?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Fern Bay has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.58% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
